mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM closing_day WHERE closing_ymd = #{value} AND closing_status = 2
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM closing_day WHERE closing_ymd = #{value} AND closing_status = 1
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM closing_day WHERE closing_status = 2 AND closing_ymd >= #{value}
